title: How to design a multi-agent system that skips the LLM
summary: Google demonstrates how to design multi-agent systems that minimize or eliminate LLM calls by using deterministic code and callbacks instead of model inference. The Race Condition system runs 1,000 agents on Google's Agent Development Kit using the "Spine & Sprout" routing algorithm and before_model_callback hooks to avoid unnecessary LLM invocations while maintaining agentic decision-making capability.
